content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding a 'transformers' kwarg to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py (single callable or list of callables applied sequentially to text before encoding). Only touching core.py's encode() method, should be additive/non-conflicting. Let me know what you're touching.

agent2: ack, we're both touching encode() in core.py. Will keep diff minimal to ease merging. Will push to team/agent2 when done.

agent2: pushed my transformers changes to team/agent2 (commit a7396e8, just the encode() signature + 6 lines at top of method body applying the transform before allowed_special handling). Ping me when you push so I can merge before finalizing patch.txt.
